origin_or_historical_context: Isolated inhabitant of the Atmosphere Factory on Mars.
stable_visual_summary: An elderly Martian with a desiccated, "dried-up" physical appearance. His silhouette reflects a life of long-term seclusion within the Atmosphere Factory, suggesting worn or utilitarian clothing consistent with isolation. He possesses a thin, aged frame characteristic of his species and environment.
physical_traits: Highly skilled in mental control/telepathy (non-visual trait)
costume_signature: Clothing suggesting long-term seclusion and isolation.
role: Caretaker / Isolated inhabitant of the Atmosphere Factory.
continuity_constraints: Must maintain a "dried-up" or desiccated visual aesthetic.
Appearance must reflect long-term isolation within an industrial/factory setting.
